headline: Google’s Nest Thermostat has hit its best price of the year
summary: Google Nest Thermostat is on sale for its best price of the year. Get it for $79 ($50 off) at Amazon. The smart device offers controls and energy-saving features to cut cooling costs.

headline: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
summary: Windows 11 updates will soon include more security fixes at once. Microsoft is using AI to identify potential issues earlier. Customers can expect a higher volume of updates in each security release.

headline: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 has been greenlit for public rollout by the Trump administration. CEO Sam Altman hails it as "the best model we have ever produced." The company also announced a new offering, 'ChatGPT Work'.

headline: Schlage’s Sense Pro unlocks the door so I don’t have to
summary: The Schlage Sense Pro is a new smart lock offering hands-free access. Using ultra-wideband (UWB), it unlocks automatically as you approach. It's described as sleek, discreet, and Schlage's smartest lock to date.

headline: Today’s Best Deals: Mortal Kombat 4K Box Set, Cronos: The New Dawn for Switch 2, and MTG x Marvel
summary: Discover today's top deals on gaming and entertainment. Highlights include a Mortal Kombat 4K Box Set and MTG x Marvel collaborations. Also find discounts on Cronos: The New Dawn for Switch 2 and during LEGO Insider Days.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Ports Out Now on PS5, But They Come at a High Cost
summary: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 are now available on PS4 and PS5. These classic titles have been ported for current-gen consoles. Be aware that these new ports come with a significant price tag.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Has Already Earned the Series' Biggest Player Peak on Steam
summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced achieved the franchise's highest player peak on Steam. The game recorded approximately 100,000 concurrent players. This marks a strong and popular launch for the Resynced version.

headline: Pokémon TCG's New Chaos Rising ETBs Are Back in Stock, and at Market Price
summary: Pokémon TCG: Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Boxes (ETBs) are back in stock on Amazon. They are available at market price for collectors. These popular ETBs are expected to sell out quickly.

headline: Heat health alerts extended as record for most 34C days in a year broken
summary: Heat health alerts have been extended across almost all of England. A new record for the most 34C days in a year has been broken. The extreme heat is expected to disrupt health services and travel.

headline: Burnham on path to No 10 with Labour nominations under way
summary: Former Greater Manchester mayor Andy Burnham is unopposed in the Labour leadership race. Nominations are currently under way to replace Sir Keir Starmer. Burnham appears to be on a clear path to becoming Labour leader.

headline: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
summary: A Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-landed at Zakynthos airport. The jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames. The airport runway has been closed following the incident.

headline: No contact from UK about on-the-run murder suspect, say Zimbabwe police
summary: Zimbabwe police state they have received no contact from the UK regarding a murder suspect. Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, the suspect, left the UK via Heathrow Airport. He departed the country on a British passport last Saturday.
